home.profession: Web developer specialized in frontend, passionate about transforming ideas into interactive experiences.

about.desc: Learn more about who I am

home.subtitle: We build digital experiences that transcend — games, tools and custom software from Guatemala to the world.

Footer.slogan: Building secure systems and exceptional interactive experiences

example.desc: AURA is a premium mobile-first bio-link template — a self-hosted alternative to Linktree. Built entirely with HTML, CSS and vanilla JS with zero library dependencies

example2.desc2: CyberSafe is a premium dark HTML template for cybersecurity companies, VPN services, IT startups, and SaaS security products. Built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

example3.desc3: Lumina AI is a premium light-mode HTML template built for AI-powered SaaS products, developer tools, and micro-SaaS startups.

example4.desc4: NexVault is a premium dark-mode HTML template built for crypto wallets, DeFi platforms, and fintech products.

example5.desc5: Vortex is a premium dark HTML template built for professional esports teams, gaming organizations, streamers and content creators.

About.description: Full-Stack & Game Developer with 4+ years of experience building high-impact digital products. Specialist in interactive interfaces, robust backend systems, and secure architecture. My approach combines agile development with an Offensive Cybersecurity mindset.

erp.desc: Led the Billing module in an institutional system for a real client. Full backend architecture and RESTful routing implementation.

buffalo.desc: Custom software design for stock management and logistics.

casaleyendas.desc: Technical coordination for the Casa de Leyendas mobile app, implementing multiplayer mechanics.

Portafolio.text: Here you will find the projects I have worked on, in fact this very page is one of them!

descriptions.description2: Interactive multiplayer game for the board game Casa de Leyendas
descriptions.description4: Inventory management for the liquor store “Buffalo Licores”.
descriptions.description5: Cinema billboard platform with updated movie information and showtimes for reservations

Games.text: One of my passions is videogames, so the road to creating the videogame of my dreams starts here

descriptions.description1: Test your memory and concentration in this matching game. Discover pairs of hidden cards as you try to solve the board in the shortest time possible.
descriptions.description2: Take control of a spaceship and face waves of alien enemies in a battle for survival.
descriptions.description3: A simple but challenging game that will keep you hooked for hours. Jump between obstacles and collect points while enjoying a relaxing but exciting experience.
descriptions.description4: Sow seeds, tend your crops and reap rewards as you adapt to the changing seasons.
descriptions.description5: Navigate the infinite space, dodging asteroids and earning points in this endless space survival game.
